017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.*;
027
028/**
029 * Flavor-neutral worker bean carrying the JSP raw-template-dispatch logic shared by the
030 * {@link JspMixin} mixin, the {@link JspServlet} servlet, and the {@link JspResource} child flavors.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * This is the §2.3.1 <i>flavor-neutral worker</i> for the JSP capability: it is <b>not</b> one of the
034 * three {@code @Rest} flavor classes &mdash; it is a plain bean that implements
035 * {@link RawTemplateDispatcher} and holds the capability state ({@code basePath}) plus the raw-serve
036 * logic. Each flavor independently holds an instance of this worker and delegates to it, so no flavor
037 * is another flavor's worker.
038 *
039 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
040 *    <li class='jc'>{@link JspMixin}
041 *    <li class='jc'>{@link JspServlet}
042 *    <li class='jc'>{@link JspResource}
043 *    <li class='jic'>{@link RawTemplateDispatcher}
044 * </ul>
045 *
046 * @since 10.0.0
047 */
048public class JspDispatcher implements RawTemplateDispatcher {
049
050   /** Default base path applied when no {@link Builder#basePath(String)} call has been made. */
051   public static final String DEFAULT_BASE_PATH = "/";
052
053   private final String basePath;
054
055   /**
056    * Creates a new builder.
057    *
058    * @return A new builder.
059    */
060   public static Builder create() {
061      return new Builder();
062   }
063
064   /**
065    * Builder constructor.
066    *
067    * @param builder The builder. Must not be {@code null}.
068    */
069   protected JspDispatcher(Builder builder) {
070      basePath = builder.basePath;
071   }
072
073   /**
074    * Returns the base path under which {@code .jsp} resources are resolved.
075    *
076    * @return The base path. Never {@code null}.
077    */
078   public String getBasePath() {
079      return basePath;
080   }
081
082   /**
083    * Forwards the request to the JSP engine for the raw {@code .jsp} resource at the trailing path.
084    *
085    * @param path The trailing path segment after the mount prefix (the JSP file name relative to
086    *    the configured {@link #getBasePath() base path}).
087    * @param req The current REST request.
088    * @param res The current REST response.
089    * @throws IOException If the underlying servlet writer fails.
090    * @throws NotFound If the JSP resource cannot be resolved.
091    */
092   @Override /* RawTemplateDispatcher */
093   public void render(String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res) throws IOException, NotFound {
094      // joinPath delegates to FileUtils.resolveVirtualPathSafely, which throws IAE on any
095      // resolved target that escapes basePath (../, %2e%2e treated as literal, absolute-path
096      // injection, etc.). Map IAE → 403 (Forbidden); attackers can't distinguish from the
097      // container-layer rejection of malformed paths.
098      String target;
099      try {
100         target = JspViewRenderer.joinPath(basePath, path);
101      } catch (IllegalArgumentException ex) {
102         throw new Forbidden("Path escapes configured base path.");
103      }
104      try {
105         var ctx = req.getServletContext();
106         var rd = ctx.getRequestDispatcher(target);
107         if (rd == null)
108            throw new InternalServerError("Could not resolve RequestDispatcher for ''{0}''. {1}",
109               target, JspViewRenderer.NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC);
110         rd.forward(req.getHttpServletRequest(), res.getHttpServletResponse());
111      } catch (NoClassDefFoundError ex) {
112         throw new InternalServerError(ex, JspViewRenderer.NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC);
113      } catch (IOException | NotFound ex) {
114         throw ex;
115      } catch (Exception ex) {
116         throw new InternalServerError(ex, "JSP render failed for ''{0}''", target);
117      }
118   }
119
120   /**
121    * Builder for {@link JspDispatcher}.
122    */
123   public static class Builder {
124
125      String basePath = DEFAULT_BASE_PATH;
126
127      /** Constructor &mdash; package access for {@link JspDispatcher#create()}. */
128      protected Builder() {}
129
130      /**
131       * Sets the classpath / webapp base path under which {@code .jsp} resources are resolved.
132       *
133       * @param value The base path. {@code null} or blank values reset to the default
134       *    {@link JspDispatcher#DEFAULT_BASE_PATH}.
135       * @return This object.
136       */
137      public Builder basePath(String value) {
138         basePath = isBlank(value) ? DEFAULT_BASE_PATH : value;
139         return this;
140      }
141
142      /**
143       * Reads the current base path setting (test/inspection helper).
144       *
145       * @return The base path. Never {@code null}.
146       */
147      public String getBasePath() {
148         return basePath;
149      }
150
151      /**
152       * Builds the {@link JspDispatcher}.
153       *
154       * @return A new {@link JspDispatcher} instance.
155       */
156      public JspDispatcher build() {
157         if (basePath == null)
158            throw iaex("basePath must not be null");
159         return new JspDispatcher(this);
160      }
161   }
162}
